analysis: The project is a website about black holes with a focus on animated objects and pages. The current files include HTML, CSS, and JavaScript for the main website. The theme should be dark and cosmic, with animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements. The existing to-dos indicate that the CSS and JavaScript files need to be completed to fully implement the black hole theme and animations.

improvements.description: Complete the CSS file with the full intended dark, cosmic theme including animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements.
Complete the JavaScript content to ensure all buttons have proper event handlers and functionality, including animations for black hole visuals and interactive elements.
Complete the HTML content to ensure all sections are properly included, such as the main content area with interactive planets, animated slides, and other sections related to black holes.
